personality_one_liner: A sharp, reactive, and performance-oriented command center for home workouts, driven by high-impact typography and Ember/Signal Red accents on deep obsidian.

spacing.rule: Use tight md/sm padding for data density, but lg/xl around hero sections. Avoid excessive whitespace between metrics.

do's: Use blur primarily on the bottom tab bar when content scrolls behind it.
Use glass overlay on sticky action buttons (like 'Start Workout') at the bottom of scrollable views.
dont's: Do not blur cards, list rows, or standard panels. Maintain tonal separation (solid surfaceSecondary) for utility clarity.

screens.name: Auth
screens.purpose: Secure entry via Emergent Google Login and Email/Password.

states.error: Red warning text below input fields.

screens.layout: Hero image at the top with a gradient scrim to Dark, followed by a clean form using Manrope. Large primary CTA for Email login, separated by an 'or' divider, followed by a Google Sign-In button with a real Google logo.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Dashboard showing daily goals, streak indicators, and rapid access to workouts.

states.loading: Skeleton blocks matching the metric cards.
states.empty: Empty state illustration reminding user to start their first workout.

screens.layout: Top section: High-impact Bebas Neue metrics (Streak, Calories, Active Minutes) layered on surfaceSecondary cards. Middle: Horizontal scrolling category chips (Abs, Arms, Chest, etc.). Bottom: Vertical list of Hero Workout Cards (Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced) using real bold imagery and top-to-bottom gradient scrims for text readability.

screens.name: Workouts
screens.purpose: Full catalog of body-part and daily workout plans.
screens.layout: Grid or vertical list of workout cards, prominently grouped by category. Filter chips sticky at top. Images use gradient scrims.

screens.name: Exercise Detail
screens.purpose: Immersive workout execution screen featuring Lottie animation area and active Rest Timer.
screens.layout: Hero area: Lottie animation container (with expo-image fallback). Below: Bold workout title and metadata. Middle: Step-by-step list of the exercise routine. Sticky Bottom: The Action Bar with 'Start Workout' button and an integrated Rest Timer. When active, Rest Timer uses a large circular animated ring (high-contrast neon green for rest phase, brand orange for active phase).

screens.name: Progress
screens.purpose: Visualize user's fitness journey through calendar and charts.

states.empty: Empty state image with 'No workouts completed yet' text.

screens.layout: Monthly calendar grid at the top. Below: Line charts or bar graphs showing volume or calories over time, styled with brandPrimary strokes on surfaceSecondary.

screens.name: Profile
screens.purpose: User stats, settings, and Stripe Premium Paywall.
screens.layout: Top: User avatar and high-level stats. Middle: Prominent Premium Paywall card (styled with gold/premium aesthetic) urging upgrade. Bottom: List of settings rows (Notifications, Account, etc.) with brandTertiary tinted Phosphor icons.

auth_hero.alt: Grayscale photo of a muscular man working out on a pull-up bar.

hero_workout_abs.alt: Woman in black tank top doing abs workout.

hero_workout_arms.alt: Focused man working out, showcasing biceps.

premium_banner.alt: Abstract golden metallic curves on a black background.

progress_empty.alt: Woman lying on floor resting in empty state.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the Lottie placeholder area on the Exercise Detail screen takes up significant hero space and includes an image fallback.
Implement the Rest Timer with a high-contrast circular animated ring and prominent audio/haptic cues (use success/neon-green for rest, brand Primary for active).
Use Dark-First Utility spacing: prefer tight `sm`/`md` padding inside data cards, but use `lg` margins on the screen edges.
All Hero image cards must include a vertical gradient scrim (transparent to surface/surfaceSecondary) behind the text overlay to ensure readability.
Do not use emojis in the UI. Use Phosphor icons.
The Premium paywall should stand out using the provided premium_banner background image and slightly elevated typography hierarchy.
Implement horizontal scrolling category chips for body parts ('Abs', 'Arms', etc.) that are 36pt height inside a 56pt container.
